series_metadata.series_description: Helps staff inform media/Attorney General on topics such as school funding. Records contain, but are not limited to, a brief summary of the interview or event, informational narratives, statistics, and some past press releases or images of the interviewer.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: , prior destroying have reviewed by State Archives. ; Paper: , unless scanned and saved electronically, prior destroying have reviewed by State Archives
